case_title: CCSF-OFFICE OF THE TREASURER-TAX COLLECTOR VS. GREGORY ZELDER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,623.80 FILED BY CCSF-OFFICE OF THE TREASURER-TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT ZELDER, GREGORY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-13-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF-OFFICE OF THE TREASURER-TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZELDER, GREGORY $4,623.80 PRINCIPAL, $45.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,669.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF-OFFICE OF THE TREASURER-TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-13-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-13-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY DAVID DONAHUE, JR., SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT GEOGORY ZELDER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-13-2017 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $45.99) SERVED AUG-13-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ZELDER, GREGORY
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 09/13/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
